name: test-mart
description: TestMart — a full-stack e-commerce app built as a stable target for Playwright UI automation.

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix server run build && npm --prefix client run build
